category_sources: source_facts.description identifies vgo as a project scaffolder for Go written in Go.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides vgo; source_facts.homepage points to the official vgo GitHub repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/vg006/vgo, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states project scaffolder for Go; source_facts.executables lists vgo as a CLI executable.
